title: asclepias quadrifolia
intro: Asclepias quadrifolia, commonly known as the green antelopehorn or four-leaf milkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to the presence of cardenolides and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Asclepias quadrifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Asclepias quadrifolia can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
